titleStmt.title: SII 17.147: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 147. (A.R. No. 127 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Vighnēśvara shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Samasta jagadādhāra etc., of

It records the assignment of the proceeds at the rate of one kuṟuṇi per mā from the lands in Vēśālipāḍi-paṟṟu excluding dēvadāna and tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands of the temples, for worship and repairs in the temple of God Tiruttiṉainagar-uḍaiyār in their village, by the administrative body (Kūṭṭapperumakkaḷ) of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam functioning from the month of Kaṟkaṭaka. The temple authorities were authorised to receive these contributions and issue receipts.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī svasti samasta jagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpuri mādhava
keraḷavaṭhaśanirmmūlana laṅkādvīpaluṇṭhana dvītiyarāma coḷakula śailaku
liśa karṇāṭarājavidrāvaṇa kāṅkakarikūṭa pākala vividharipudurggamarddana vīragaṇḍago
pālavipinadāvadahana kādvīpuravarādhīśvara gaṇapatihariṇaśārdūla nellūrapura viracitavīrābhiṣeka
praṇatarājapratiṣṭhāpaka mahārājādhirāja parameśvara koccaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti kaḷ śrīcu
ntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvvedimaṅkalat
tu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟu mutal grāma kāriyam tiruttukiṟa kūṭṭapperumakkaḷ Eḻuttu . nammūr Uṭaiyār tirutti
ṉainakar Uṭaiyār koyilil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Innāyaṉārkku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Ivvāṇṭu
pacāṉamutal nammūrilum piṭākai vecālipāṭipaṟṟukaḷiḷum payirccey nilattil palataḷi nāyaṉmār te
vatāṉamum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamum nīkki nīkki niṉṟa nilat yirukku māttāl kuṟuṇiyāka van
ta nellu Ūrtoṟum koyil tāṉattil veṇṭuvār taṇṭi koyil taravu kuṭukkavum Ippaṭikku
nāyaṉār tirukkoyilile kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi candrā
dityavaraiyum celuttikkoḷḷavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai nittaviṉota cce
ri tūrppil sarvvādityaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rājar[ājacc]eri kuravaceri vāmaṉapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu []
Ippaṭikku Ivai mummuṭicoḻacceri paḻu � sarai� yanampipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu [] Ippa
ṭikku Ivai śrīrājarājacceri paśiṇṭi Ayalatta nampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu [] Ippaṭik
ku Ivai mummuṭicoḻacceri ma
Digital edition of SII 17.147 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
